Tabs

Source: Figma Tabs (2294:4392). Underlined text tabs (different from the Content Switcher segmented control). 7 states. Variable bottom padding (6 / 10 / 12 / 14 / 16 px) and horizontal padding (0-14 px).

Single-tab states
State Preview
Default
Hover on Default
Active
Hover on Active
Active Border (only)
Hover on Active Border
Disabled
Tab strips (Tab_Default_Base)

Click any tab — only one is active at a time per strip.

Count = 4 · Bottom padding 12px
Count = 6 · Bottom padding 10px
Count = 8 · Bottom padding 14px
Count = 2 · Bottom padding 6px (compact)
